---
title: "VotulMeu"
date: 2025-05-05
description: "Voting Advice Application for the 2025 Romanian Presidential election."
categories: [News]
image: images_highlights/votulmeu-vaa-2025.png
---

**VotulMeu** is a modern political profiling tool created for the May 2025 presidential elections. The purpose of this tool is to help voters identify the candidate who is closest to their own political preferences and to allow them to quickly access information about the candidates' positions in the context of the upcoming elections.

**VotulMeu** is carried out by the Center for the Study of Democracy within UBB Cluj, in partnership with researchers from universities abroad, and is coordinated by Dr. George Jiglău and Dr. Fernando Mendez (Centre for Democracy Studies Aarau, University of Zürich, and Dr. Costas Tziouvas from DigiPols at the Cyprus University of Technology. The VAA can be accessed online at [https://votulmeu.eu](https://votulmeu.eu).
